headline: Shares of companies in the broader software sector are trading lower amid a pullback in sentiment after Q1 financial results and outlook comments from industry peers IBM and ServiceNow.

headline: Lake County, Illinois, Sheriff’s Office Enhances Services With Tyler Technologies’ Public Safety Solutions
summary: PLANO, Texas, April 23, 2026--Tyler Technologies announced today the Lake County Sheriff’s Office in Illinois has gone live with Tyler’s Enterprise Public Safety suite.
